headline: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
summary: Amazon's Echo Show 21, a versatile smart home hub, is currently on sale. It features a large 21-inch screen, combining functions like a smart calendar and kitchen TV. The device is now $80 off at major retailers.

headline: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr is accused of suppressing free speech rights. He allegedly threatened broadcasters for making jokes about the president. Critics argue he is misusing his authority over national media.

headline: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Anthropic has expanded Claude AI's voice mode to its Opus and Sonnet models. Previously, voice mode was limited to the faster, less powerful Haiku model. This enhancement extends voice capabilities to apps like Gmail and Slack.

headline: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
summary: Patreon is implementing layoffs affecting 20% of its workforce, roughly 93 employees. CEO Jack Conte cited AI's transformative impact on the tech industry as a factor. He clarified the layoffs are not due to AI directly replacing human roles.

headline: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls Reveals First Year 1 DLC Character, Opening Movie Released | Comic Con 2026
summary: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls unveiled its inaugural Year 1 DLC character. An exciting opening movie for the game was also released. Both reveals took place during a panel at San Diego Comic-Con 2026.

headline: The Grade A Refurb Nintendo Switch 2 Mario Kart World Console Bundle Just Dropped to $419 at Woot
summary: A Grade A refurbished Nintendo Switch 2 Mario Kart World Console Bundle is now available for $419 at Woot. This marks an additional $20 price drop from an already great deal. Gamers can snag the console at a significantly reduced cost.

headline: New Blue and Yellow Joy-Con 2 Are Now Available
summary: Nintendo has released new Blue and Yellow Joy-Con 2 controllers. These fresh color options are now available for purchase. Gamers can customize their Switch with the vibrant new designs.

headline: We Got a Closer Look at the LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade Set at SDCC | Comic Con 2026
summary: The LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade Set was showcased at SDCC 2026, offering a detailed look. Attendees saw how the set simulates gameplay, allowing Jumpman to run and jump over barrels. This upcoming set brings the classic arcade experience to LEGO form.

headline: Burnham pauses plan to release some prisoners early from September
summary: The prime minister has paused plans for the early release of certain prisoners. No prisoners will be released from September until a thorough review is completed. This decision reverses previous intentions for early releases.

headline: Mum and daughter who died at beach were trying to save boy, 7
summary: A mother, Shally Rahman, and her teenage daughter, Samiha Rahman, tragically drowned at a beach. Emergency services reported they were attempting to rescue a 7-year-old boy. Both were pulled from the water in a devastating incident.

headline: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
summary: Brent crude oil prices surged over 6% on Thursday, reaching $100 per barrel. This marks the first time prices have hit this level since May. The escalation of the war in the Middle East is cited as the primary driver.

headline: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
summary: Donald Trump stated that Saudi Arabia's recognition of Israel is key for a nuclear deal. The landmark agreement involves US assistance for Saudi nuclear energy development. Joining the Abraham Accords is a condition for the deal.
